# Pogo Roadmap

*Generated by pm-pogo on 2026-04-27 09:17 BST. Manual edits will be overwritten on next sweep — push back via OVERRIDE mail to pm-pogo, or by editing `~/.pogo/agents/pm/pogo.toml`.*

## Strategic frame

Three product-line deliverables (per Daniel, 2026-04-26):

1. **Pogo internals** — roadmaps, PMs, token tracking. Internal tooling that compounds.
2. **Pogo Darwin** — native Mac app to make pogo usable for non-programmers. Monetized.
3. **Rent-a-programmer** — SaaS-hosted pogo. Monetized.

Ranking constraint (Daniel's call): minimize **human involvement** and **token usage**. Under that lens:

| Deliverable | Human cost | Token cost | Rank |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1. Pogo internals | Low — polecats do the work, PMs steer | Medium — proportional to backlog | **1st** |
| 2. Pogo Darwin | High — $99/yr Apple Dev, manual signing/notarization, Paddle setup | Medium | 2nd |
| 3. Rent-a-programmer | High — DNS, AWS, OAuth, Stripe, multi-tenant security, prod deploys | High — broad feature surface | 3rd |

Daniel's stated 1/2/3 ordering survives the constraint analysis. Deliverables 2 and 3 are currently **gated behind Daniel-greenlight tickets** (mg-2350 for pogo-darwin; mg-c1d6 for rent-a-programmer); active push stays on deliverable 1.
